title: First TCL Season
body: Joined the Tampa Cricket League. First organised leather ball cricket in the United States — a new environment, new teammates, and the start of a competitive record.

title: St Pete Shields — Titan Cup X
body: Represented St Pete Shields in the Titan Cup X leather ball competition. Nine matches, 83 runs, and a high score of 33 — building consistency and experience across a full season.

label: Fall 2024
title: SWAT TPL Tennis Ball — 7 Wickets
body: Switched format and joined SWAT for the TPL Tennis Ball Fall 2024 series. The move paid off with the best bowling return of the archive: 7 wickets across 8 matches, headlined by a career-best 4/30.

title: SWAT Titan Cup XI — First Leather Fifty
body: Back to leather ball with SWAT. Nine matches, 228 runs, and a 54 that marked the first half-century in the leather ball format — the most productive batting season of the archive.

label: Jan 2026
title: TB Bengal Tigers — Career Best 63
body: Joined TB Bengal Tigers for the 2026 TCL season. Hit a career-best 63 in the opening phase of the campaign — the highest score of the personal archive, at a strike rate above 130.

label: Feb 2026
title: Two Catches vs Allies
body: February 19, 2026 — Allies vs TB Bengal Tigers. Two catches in the field. The first fully verified match entry in the personal archive.
